prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定偏热；江西省2026年普通高考总人数474,900人，按近年比例估算物理类约267,800人，较2025年物理类266,425人略有增加，竞争略有加剧；兰州大学位于甘肃省，与江西省地理距离较远，属于跨省招生；该校在江西省招生规模相对稳定（理科约80–98人），地域偏好对报考影响中性。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 8431 → 9033 → 8895 → 9750 → 15220. In 2025, there was a significant backward shift, dropping 5470 places compared to 2024, mainly due to adjustments in the new college entrance examination subject selection model and the division of major groups. The 2025 baseline is approximately 15220. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 79 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and 95 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 98, a slight expansion of 3 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 3.2%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 40th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 38–40 range in recent years, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat positive; incidents such as a master's graduate thanking the security department for allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus demonstrate humanistic care, enhancing the school's image. On Douyin, it ranks 53rd in overall popularity, rated as 'relatively hot,' with medium-to-high short video exposure. There is no historical record of enrollment interruptions. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it achieved A+ in Ecology and Grassland Science, A- in Chemistry, Geography, and Biology, totaling five disciplines rated A- or above. Grassland Science and Ecology are at the national top level, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Grassland Science and Ecology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable and relatively high popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Jiangxi Province is 474,900, with an estimated physics category of about 267,800 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 266,425 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Lanzhou University is located in Gansu Province, which is geographically distant from Jiangxi Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province is relatively stable (about 80–98 students in science), and regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the expected rebound after the abnormal ranking shift in 2025, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026, and a minor increase in local candidates, along with the reassessment of the university's cost-effectiveness by candidates after the sharp drop in 2025 (rebound effect) and the positive reputation boosting application enthusiasm, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward (decrease in number). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15,358, with a range of 14,858 to 15,858.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14,858–15,858, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (≤14,858), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, as well as Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (approximately 15,858), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.
